root_text.an4.213:1.1: “Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an4.213:1.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, catūhi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an4.213:2.1: Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an4.213:2.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, catūhi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an4.213:1.1: “Mendicants, someone with four qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.213:1.3: Bad conduct by way of body, speech, and mind, and being ungrateful and thankless.
translation_text.an4.213:1.4: Someone with these four qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.213:2.1: Someone with four qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.213:2.3: Good conduct by way of body, speech, and mind, and being grateful and thankful.
translation_text.an4.213:2.4: Someone with these four qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
